title: hoya loheri subsp. loheri
intro: Hoya loheri subsp. loheri, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is a type of waxflower native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hoya loheri subsp. loheri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Hoya loheri subsp. loheri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
